heading: Chief of bureau; appointment and duties
label: 402 Chief of bureau; appointment and duties
text: A Chief of the Bureau of Dairy Industry shall be appointed by the Secretary of Agriculture, who shall be subject to the general direction of the Secretary of Agriculture. He shall devote his time to the investigation of the dairy industry, and the dissemination of information for the promotion of the dairy industry.
notes: Change of Name“Bureau of Dairying” established by act , designated “Bureau of Dairy Industry” by act .May 29, 1924May 11, 1926
